summary: Completed testing of Tiered Commission Engine for tutors. All backend API tests passed (40/40) and frontend displays all required tier badges and commission info correctly. Commission rates verified: New=30%, Rated=25%, Elite=20%. All 6 tutors are currently at 'new' tier as expected.
seed_data_creation: Used existing tutors in database. 6 tutors all at 'new' tier (30% commission).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tiered Commission Engine fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) All backend endpoints working correctly - GET /api/commission/tiers, GET /api/commission/admin/summary, POST /api/commission/evaluate-all, GET /api/commission/tutor/{teacher_id}, POST /api/commission/calculate. 2) Commission rates verified: New=30%, Rated=25%, Elite=20%. 3) Frontend Teacher Dashboard shows tier badge in header and welcome banner with correct earnings rate (70% for New Tutor). 4) Earnings Wallet shows tier info, platform fee percentage, and progress to next tier. 5) Admin Dashboard shows Commission Tier Summary with tier distribution (6 New, 0 Rated, 0 Elite) and Run Monthly Evaluation button. 6) Tier evaluation runs successfully with correct output. 7) Wallet integration verified - deduct_credits imports get_tutor_commission_rate for dynamic commission.
